name: financial-advisor
description: Personal AI Financial Advisor - Multiplatform Desktop App with AI Integration

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run build:packages && cd packages/vscode-extension && npm run build && npm run package -- -o ../../financial-advisor-${npm_package_version}.vsix
scripts.build:packages: cd packages/domain && npm run build && cd ../ledger && npm run build && cd ../ingestion && npm run build && cd ../resolution && npm run build && cd ../analytics && npm run build && cd ../advice && npm run build && cd ../ai-providers && npm run build && cd ../shared && npm run build && cd ../ai-integration && npm run build && cd ../financial-tools && npm run build && cd ../mcp-server && npm run build
scripts.pretest: npm run build:packages && npm run compile:test && npm run lint
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:packages && npm run compile:test && mkdir -p out/test/packages/mcp-server out/test/packages/shared out/test/packages/ai-integration out/test/packages/financial-tools out/test/packages/domain out/test/packages/ledger out/test/packages/ingestion out/test/packages/resolution out/test/packages/analytics out/test/packages/advice out/test/packages/ai-providers && cp -r packages/mcp-server/dist out/test/packages/mcp-server/ && cp -r packages/shared/dist out/test/packages/shared/ && cp -r packages/ai-integration/dist out/test/packages/ai-integration/ && cp -r packages/financial-tools/dist out/test/packages/financial-tools/ && cp -r packages/domain/dist out/test/packages/domain/ && cp -r packages/ledger/dist out/test/packages/ledger/ && cp -r packages/ingestion/dist out/test/packages/ingestion/ && cp -r packages/resolution/dist out/test/packages/resolution/ && cp -r packages/analytics/dist out/test/packages/analytics/ && cp -r packages/advice/dist out/test/packages/advice/ && cp -r packages/ai-providers/dist out/test/packages/ai-providers/ && mocha out/test/test/unit/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:packages && npm run compile:test && mkdir -p out/test/packages/mcp-server out/test/packages/shared out/test/packages/ai-integration out/test/packages/financial-tools out/test/packages/domain out/test/packages/ledger out/test/packages/ingestion out/test/packages/resolution out/test/packages/analytics out/test/packages/advice out/test/packages/ai-providers && cp -r packages/mcp-server/dist out/test/packages/mcp-server/ && cp -r packages/shared/dist out/test/packages/shared/ && cp -r packages/ai-integration/dist out/test/packages/ai-integration/ && cp -r packages/financial-tools/dist out/test/packages/financial-tools/ && cp -r packages/domain/dist out/test/packages/domain/ && cp -r packages/ledger/dist out/test/packages/ledger/ && cp -r packages/ingestion/dist out/test/packages/ingestion/ && cp -r packages/resolution/dist out/test/packages/resolution/ && cp -r packages/analytics/dist out/test/packages/analytics/ && cp -r packages/advice/dist out/test/packages/advice/ && cp -r packages/ai-providers/dist out/test/packages/ai-providers/ && mocha out/test/test/integration/**/*.test.js
scripts.coverage: npm run build:packages && npm run compile:test && mkdir -p out/test/packages/mcp-server out/test/packages/shared out/test/packages/ai-integration out/test/packages/financial-tools out/test/packages/domain out/test/packages/ledger out/test/packages/ingestion out/test/packages/resolution out/test/packages/analytics out/test/packages/advice out/test/packages/ai-providers && cp -r packages/mcp-server/dist out/test/packages/mcp-server/ && cp -r packages/shared/dist out/test/packages/shared/ && cp -r packages/ai-integration/dist out/test/packages/ai-integration/ && cp -r packages/financial-tools/dist out/test/packages/financial-tools/ && cp -r packages/domain/dist out/test/packages/domain/ && cp -r packages/ledger/dist out/test/packages/ledger/ && cp -r packages/ingestion/dist out/test/packages/ingestion/ && cp -r packages/resolution/dist out/test/packages/resolution/ && cp -r packages/analytics/dist out/test/packages/analytics/ && cp -r packages/advice/dist out/test/packages/advice/ && cp -r packages/ai-providers/dist out/test/packages/ai-providers/ && nyc mocha out/test/test/unit/**/*.test.js
scripts.clean:rust: cargo clean --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml || echo 'No Rust to clean'
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run clean:rust
scripts.bootstrap: npm run setup && npm run build
scripts.audit:security: npm audit && npx osv-scanner -r . || echo 'OSV scanner not critical'
scripts.check:all: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build
scripts.licenses:report: npx license-checker --json > licenses.json && npx license-checker --csv > licenses.csv
